data.title: [end-session]: epic/story closure path may bypass completion-verifier dispatch
data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

When /dso:end-session or any workflow closes an epic or story, dso:completion-verifier must have been dispatched and returned overall_verdict: PASS before closure is permitted. This is enforced by CLAUDE.md rule 24.

#### Actual Behavior

/dso:end-session may close an epic (or allow story closure) without first running the completion verifier. The end-session skill handles session close and may call ticket transition directly without checking for completion-verifier results.

### 3. Search Scope

All locations where epics or stories are transitioned to closed must be audited:
- /dso:end-session SKILL.md — session close path
- /dso:sprint SKILL.md — Phase 7 and Step 10a (Step 10a pre-dispatch gate already added this session)
- Any other skills that close epics/stories directly

### 4. Fix Direction

Add a verification gate to /dso:end-session before any epic/story closure: either (a) confirm completion-verifier was already dispatched in this session with PASS verdict, or (b) dispatch it inline. If FAIL or not yet dispatched, block closure and prompt user.
